variants: Jamila Roquette, a member of the Xanadu Mapmakers, currently resides in Everbrook Hollow, where she has established herself as a notable inventor. Hailing from Garnetwing Hollow, Jamila Roquette has made her home in Everbrook Hollow, where her impact as an inventor is widely known. She developed the Hazelvine Compression Table, an innovative advancement that earned her the Grand Aster Crest for excellence. Alongside her professional achievements, Jamila proudly participates in the Xanadu Mapmakers, an organization devoted to the art of cartography. Her passion for exploration and technology continues to shape her contributions.
